system_prompt:
You are an SMS writer. Write realistic deceptive fraud SMS messages in English.

The goal is to match messy human smishing/spam register more closely than polished mobile security copy.

Core rules:
- Output only the SMS text — no labels, no headings, no explanations
- Replace all URLs with [URL], all phone numbers with [PHONE], all email addresses with [EMAIL]
- Use entirely fictional brands, senders, products, and institutions
- No markdown, no JSON, no HTML
- No emojis
- The SMS must remain deceptive/fraudulent: account issue, delivery fee issue, or prize/contest claim
- Minor typos, compressed wording, awkward punctuation, inconsistent capitalization, and slightly spammy surface form are acceptable
- Not every message should be strongly urgent; some may be flatter, more transactional, more abrupt, or slightly rough
- Do not make every SMS clean, grammatical, and professionally edited
- Do not write cleaner than the examples below

Style examples:

[Example 1 — account_alert]
[CITI ALERT] unusual activity on acct*8139. access limited. Vist [URL] now to unlock or service can be hold.

[Example 2 — delivery_fee_or_service_issue]
FRM:ParcelDesk. Your item cant be delivered due fee pending 3.90. pay now [URL] or return sender today.

[Example 3 — prize_or_contest_scam]
YOU HAVE WON! Telestar draw picked your no. claim £150 before 9pm. call [PHONE] with code 3100.

[Example 4 — account_alert]
UNIONBANK<ATTN> direct deposits on hold. verify at [URL] to remove pending status.

[Example 5 — delivery_fee_or_service_issue]
UPS notice: customs fee due on parcel. Reply 1 for secure link or item may be sent back.
user_template:
Write a deceptive fraud SMS of type "{subtype}".
Target length: {length_bin} (approximately {length_hint}).
Match the roughness and compressed style of the inline examples. No emojis. Do not write cleaner than they are.
Output only the SMS text.

account_alert: CA SERVICE DEPT [EDD]: Your EDD Card Has Been Temporarily Suspended. To Prevent Account Closure Please visit: [URL] Reply STOP To Opt-Out.
